name: heroku-node-getting-started
notes: Official Heroku Node/Express sample; npm install + npm start serves HTTP on PORT.

name: azure-node-hello-world
notes: Azure plain Node http server sample; npm start (node index.js) serves Hello World.

name: docker-getting-started-app
notes: Docker tutorial Express todo app with in-memory sqlite; npm install + npm run dev serves on 3000.

name: socketio-chat-example
notes: Official Socket.IO chat demo; npm start (node index.js) serves HTTP on 3000.

name: cf-sample-app-nodejs
notes: Cloud Foundry Node sample; no start script but server.js present so npm start runs node server.js.

name: sclorg-nodejs-ex
notes: OpenShift Node example app; npm install + npm start serves HTTP on 8080, no DB required.

name: nestjs-typescript-starter
notes: Official NestJS starter; npm install + npm start serves Hello World on 3000.

name: johnpapa-node-hello
notes: Minimal Node hello-world HTTP server; npm start (node index.js) serves on 3000.

name: azure-js-e2e-express-server
notes: Azure Express sample; npm install + npm start (node src/index.js) serves HTTP.

name: react-gh-pages-cra
notes: Small create-react-app demo; npm start runs react-scripts dev server on 3000.

name: azure-flask-quickstart
notes: Azure Flask quickstart; pip install -r requirements.txt + flask run serves HTTP, no DB.

name: azure-django-quickstart
notes: Azure Django quickstart; manage.py runserver serves HTTP with no external DB.

name: azure-python-hello-world
notes: Tiny Azure Flask hello-world app; flask run serves single route.

name: heroku-python-getting-started
notes: Official Heroku Django sample; runs locally via manage.py runserver (sqlite fallback, no secrets).

name: miguelgrinberg-microblog
notes: Flask Mega-Tutorial blog app; flask run with sqlite default serves HTTP.

name: miguelgrinberg-flasky
notes: Flask Web Development book app; flask run with sqlite default serves HTTP.

name: sclorg-django-ex
notes: OpenShift Django example; manage.py runserver works with sqlite, no config needed.

name: ibm-get-started-python
notes: IBM Cloud Flask sample; python hello.py serves HTTP, runs without Cloudant credentials.

name: azure-fastapi-quickstart
notes: Azure FastAPI quickstart (main.py + requirements.txt confirmed); uvicorn main:app serves HTTP.

name: flask-video-streaming
notes: Small Flask MJPEG streaming demo; python app.py serves HTTP using bundled emulated camera images.

name: junegunn-fzf
notes: Popular Go fuzzy-finder CLI; go build then fzf --version/--help exercisable.

name: rakyll-hey
notes: Go HTTP load-testing CLI; go build ./... then hey with no args prints usage.

name: muesli-duf
notes: Go disk-usage CLI; go build then duf --help or duf runs standalone.

name: heroku-go-getting-started
notes: Official Heroku Go (Gin) web sample; go run serves HTTP on PORT.

name: traefik-whoami
notes: Tiny Go HTTP server echoing request info; go build/run, HTTP reachable (default port 80, flag-configurable).

name: pallets-click
notes: Python CLI-toolkit library; pip install -e . + pytest passes with minimal deps.

name: more-itertools
notes: Zero-dependency Python iterator utilities library; python -m unittest/pytest runs test suite.

name: python-attrs
notes: attrs class-boilerplate library; pip install -e .[tests] + pytest exercises suite offline.

name: httpie-cli
notes: HTTPie HTTP client; pip install . then http --help exercises the CLI.

name: tqdm-cli
notes: tqdm progress-bar tool; pip install . then python -m tqdm --help or piped usage works.

name: antirez-kilo
notes: 1k-line C text editor; plain make compiles single binary (editor itself is interactive).

name: antirez-linenoise
notes: Small C line-editing library; make builds the example program.

name: rui314-chibicc
notes: Small C compiler; make test builds chibicc and runs full test suite to completion.

name: karpathy-llama2c
notes: Llama-2 inference in pure C; make run compiles run.c (inference needs model download, so build is the verdict).

name: kokke-tiny-aes-c
notes: Small portable AES implementation in C; make test compiles and runs test vectors to completion.

name: example-voting-app
notes: Canonical Docker compose demo: vote/result apps + redis + postgres; root docker-compose.yml, no env needed.

name: full-stack-fastapi-template
notes: Official FastAPI full-stack template; root compose.yml with backend/frontend + postgres, .env with defaults committed.

name: fastapi-tdd-docker
notes: TestDriven.io FastAPI tutorial; root docker-compose.yml brings up web + postgres with inline env (verified no env_file).

name: dockersamples-wordsmith
notes: Docker demo: web + api + postgres; root docker-compose.yml publishes 8080, zero configuration.

name: wger-docker
notes: Official wger fitness-app compose repo: web + postgres + redis + nginx; env file committed (config/prod.env), slow first start.

name: sameersbn-docker-redmine
notes: Compose-first Redmine + postgres with all creds inline in docker-compose.yml; compose up builds/pulls image (longer run).

name: nickjj-docker-flask-example
notes: Compose-first Flask + postgres + redis template; requires cp .env.example .env (dev defaults, no secrets) before docker compose up.

name: nickjj-docker-django-example
notes: Compose-first Django + postgres + redis template; same cp .env.example .env then docker compose up pattern.

name: stefanprodan-dockprom
notes: Compose-first monitoring stack (Grafana + Prometheus + alertmanager + exporters + caddy); docker-compose up works with defaults, HTTP reachable.

name: mattermost-docker
notes: Official Mattermost compose deployment (app + postgres + nginx); needs cp env.example .env first (documented step, no secrets).

name: github-gitignore
notes: Collection of .gitignore templates; no code to run.

name: sindresorhus-awesome
notes: Curated awesome-lists index; markdown only, nothing runnable.

name: coding-interview-university
notes: Self-study CS curriculum in markdown; docs-only repo.

name: free-programming-books
notes: Huge markdown list of free books/resources; nothing to run.

name: vinta-awesome-python
notes: Curated list of Python frameworks/libraries; docs-only markdown repo.
